tasks.notes: Phase C every 15 min during market hours. Restored 2026-04-16 C1.

04:45 IST daily. daily_articles.py â€” writes war + epstein articles and data/articles_index.json. Watchdog verifies YESTERDAY's pair (war + epstein) landed â€” catches silent LLM-rejection / grounding failures in either pillar.

04:30 IST Mon-Fri. MIGRATED TO VPS 2026-04-28 (anka-daily-dump.timer + .service systemd unit on Contabo 185.182.8.107). run_daily.py prices/fundamentals/FII flows. Writes date-stamped files in pipeline/data/daily/ on VPS. Laptop pulls back via AnkaVPSSyncDaily 04:50 IST. Watchdog checks the PREVIOUS business day's files so alerts are robust against being run before today's 04:30 firing.

08:00 IST daily. backfill_earnings_calendar.py (with --asof today). Source: IndianAPI /corporate_actions per F&O ticker. Feeds the H-2026-04-25-001 earnings-decoupling pre-registered hypothesis backtest. Per data validation policy Â§15 freshness contract: snapshot age must not exceed cadence Ã— grace = 36h before WARN.
16:20 IST. news_backtest.py â€” verdicts on detected news events.
16:00 IST. Runs run_signals.py --eod â€” prints EOD dashboard + Telegram send, does not write data files. track_record.json ownership belongs to AnkaEODTrackRecord (website_exporter.py).
16:15 IST. run_eod_report.py + website_exporter.py. Authoritative writer of data/track_record.json (website_exporter.py line 430).
Sunday 01:00 IST. fit_feature_scorer.bat â€” quarterly walk-forward fit of Feature Coincidence Scorer logistic-regression models per ticker over the F&O universe. Consumed intraday by score_universe.

Intraday apply of Feature Coincidence Scorer models. Runs inside intraday_scan.bat (python -m pipeline.feature_scorer.score_universe) after the correlation break scanner and before website_exporter; writes attractiveness_scores.json consumed by /api/attractiveness. host=embedded â€” no standalone Windows trigger; freshness contract still enforced via output mtime.
08:30 IST. autoresearch/gap_predictor.py â€” overnight gap risk analysis.

05:30 IST daily. anka-gemma4-health-check.timer + .service on VPS systemd (migrated 2026-04-28). POSTs PONG to local Ollama at 127.0.0.1:11434/v1/chat/completions. FAIL -> rc=1 + Telegram. DEGRADED (lat>60s) -> rc=0 + Telegram. Service unit shipped but not enabled until install_gemma4_contabo.sh has been run. Pilot: 2026-04-29 -> 2026-05-19.

22:00 IST daily. anka-gemma4-daily-report.timer + .service on VPS systemd (migrated 2026-04-28; enabled 2026-04-28 17:30 IST). EOD aggregation of rubric pass-rates + pairwise win-rates per pilot task; emits Telegram one-liner. Pilot: 2026-04-29 -> 2026-05-19.

Hourly 09:00-22:00 IST guardrail. anka-gemma4-auto-disable.timer + .service on VPS systemd (migrated 2026-04-28; enabled 2026-04-28 17:30 IST). Disables a pilot task in llm_routing.json if 24h shadow rubric <90% (n>=5); flags manual_review/<task>.flag if 7d pairwise <40% (n>=10). Pilot: 2026-04-29 -> 2026-05-19.

09:20 + 16:45 IST. Watchdog gate pass â€” all tiers + drift. Registered 2026-04-16. Inventoried to eliminate self-drift. Step 4b runs track_record_audit (count/avg-pnl/staleness vs closed_signals); step 4c runs chart_universe_audit (273-ticker coverage + last-bar freshness + 6-ticker narrative-marker regression, state at pipeline/data/chart_audit_state.json) â€” both fire CONTENT_DRIFT alerts via the existing dedup/digest path.
Every 15 min Mon-Fri 09:30-15:30 IST. Watchdog intraday pass â€” critical tier only. Registered 2026-04-16. Inventoried to eliminate self-drift.

07:15 IST Mon-Fri. arcbe_scan.bat -> run_correlation_scan.py. Writes date-stamped pipeline/data/correlation_report_YYYY-MM-DD.json (file-freshness not checked due to date-stamped name). Upstream for AnkaMorningBrief0730.

Saturday 22:00 IST. MIGRATED TO VPS 2026-04-25 (anka-etf-reoptimize.timer). Golden Goose Plan 1 v2 system DEPRECATED 2026-04-26 (project_etf_v3_failed_2026_04_26.md) — v3 CURATED-30 supersedes; this task remains scheduled but its outputs are not load-bearing this week. outputs[] empty until v3 production engine wired; reverse-sync then needs etf_optimal_weights.json + regime_trade_map.json added to vps_sync_weekly.bat.
04:45 IST daily. etf_daily_signal.py â€” compute today_zone using stored weights. Must run AFTER AnkaDailyDump (04:30).

Sunday 00:00 IST. MIGRATED TO VPS 2026-04-25 (anka-unified-backtest.timer). 777-day historical replay. DEFERRED until system stabilizes per 2026-04-28 ops decision; outputs[] empty until reverse-sync wires backtest_results.json + backtest_summary.json into vps_sync_weekly.bat. Reactivate when needed.

09:25 IST daily. phase_c_shadow_open.bat — F3 live shadow ledger: filters today's OPPORTUNITY Phase C signals, records OPEN rows at live Kite LTP. Purpose: forward-test the H1 OPPORTUNITY hypothesis (see docs/research/phase-c-validation/). + paired-options sidecar (2026-04-27): also opens ATM-options leg via phase_c_options_shadow.py.

14:30 IST daily. phase_c_shadow_close.bat — mechanical time-stop: transitions all OPEN rows to CLOSED at live Kite LTP. Realized net P&L via cost_model (₹50k notional, 5 bps slippage). + paired-options sidecar (2026-04-27): also closes ATM-options leg via phase_c_options_shadow.py.
Sunday 01:30 IST. fit_ta_scorer.bat â€” TA Coincidence Scorer v1 weekly walk-forward fit (RELIANCE pilot). Output consumed daily by AnkaTAScorerScore.
Daily 16:00 IST. score_ta_scorer.bat â€” TA Coincidence Scorer v1 daily EOD scoring after bars lock. Output consumed by /api/ta_attractiveness and the TA adapter in the Unified Analysis Panel.

20:00 IST daily. AnkaAutoresearchMode2.bat â€” v2 Mode 2 overnight autoresearch orchestrator: Haiku proposer + in-sample compiler per regime quantile. Writes sharded proposal_log_<regime>.jsonl files. Freshness contract: 16h.

05:00 IST daily. AnkaAutoresearchBHFDR.bat â€” per-regime Benjamini-Hochberg FDR batch check; demotes hypotheses that fail the alpha-corrected p-value threshold. Writes bh_fdr_batch_state.json. Freshness contract: 24h.

05:30 IST daily. AnkaAutoresearchHoldout.bat â€” single-touch holdout runner; evaluates BH-FDR survivors against the held-out data slice and appends result to holdout_run_log.jsonl. Freshness contract: 24h.

16:30 IST Mon-Fri. anka-bulk-deals.timer + .service on VPS systemd (Cohort G 2026-04-28). python -m pipeline.bulk_deals — pulls NSE rolling-today bulk + block deals CSVs from nsearchives.nseindia.com and writes one parquet per trade-date. Forward-only (see memory/reference_nse_bulk_deals_history_unavailable.md). Feeds forensic card v2 bulk_deal_T channel.

18:30 IST Mon-Fri. anka-insider-trades.timer + .service on VPS systemd (Cohort G 2026-04-28). python -m pipeline.insider_trades — pulls NSE PIT (insider trading) disclosures from /api/corporates-pit. Pulls last 7 days each run because PIT filings often arrive 1-3 days late. Backfill 2021+ is one-shot. Feeds forensic card v2 insider channel.

09:30 IST daily during holdout 2026-04-27 -> 2026-05-26. h_2026_04_26_001_paper_open.bat -- H-2026-04-26-001 + H-2026-04-26-002 forward paper test. Filters |z|>=2.0 signals, fades divergence, opens at Kite LTP. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-26-sigma-break-mechanical-v1-design.md. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

14:30 IST daily during holdout 2026-04-27 -> 2026-05-26. h_2026_04_26_001_paper_close.bat -- mechanical TIME_STOP per spec section 5: closes all OPEN rows at Kite LTP. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

14:25 IST daily during holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-01 (auto-extend 2026-10-31 if n<20). h_2026_05_01_earnings_drift_open.bat -- H-2026-05-01-EARNINGS-DRIFT-LONG-v1: opens LONG on (symbol, event_date) where event_date == next trading day, vol_z >= 0.52, short_mom > 0, realized_vol_21d_pct >= 29, regime in {NEUTRAL, RISK-ON}. Frozen 40-name universe (NIFTY Bank + IT). First-touch dedup per (symbol, event_date). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-01-earnings-drift-long-v1-design.md. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

14:30 IST daily during holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-01 (auto-extend 2026-10-31 if n<20). h_2026_05_01_earnings_drift_close.bat -- mechanical TIME_STOP per spec section 7: scans OPEN rows where (entry_date + 5 trading days) <= today, closes at Kite LTP, writes gross_bps + net_s1_bps. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

Mondays 09:25 IST during holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-01 (auto-extend until n_NEUTRAL_cutoffs >= 6 OR 2026-10-31). anka-theme-neutral-picker-open.timer + .service on VPS systemd -- H-2026-05-04-theme-detector-earnings-skip-v1: loads themes_proposer output (with inline propose() fallback), attaches V3-CURATED-30 PIT regime, applies earnings-density==0 filter, picks top-K=3 by v1.4 raw-weight. Skip if regime != NEUTRAL OR <3 themes pass filter. Idempotent on (cutoff). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-04-theme-detector-earnings-skip-v1-design.md. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

14:30 IST Mon-Fri during holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-10-31. anka-theme-neutral-picker-exit-check.timer + .service on VPS systemd -- mechanical TIME_STOP per spec section 7: scans OPEN rows where today >= fwd21_target_close_date, closes basket at Kite LTP, computes basket gross + net@15bps + net@20bps. Idempotent. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

09:30 IST daily during holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-01 (auto-extend 2026-10-31 if n<100). H-2026-05-01-phase-c-mr-karpathy-v1: regime-aware mean-revert intraday with 6-of-8 Karpathy qualifier. POSSIBLE_OPPORTUNITY routing + {RISK-ON, CAUTION} regime gate + event-day skip. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-01-phase-c-mr-karpathy-v1-design.md. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

14:30 IST daily during holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-01 (auto-extend 2026-10-31 if n<100). Mechanical TIME_STOP per spec section 7: closes all OPEN rows at next 5m bar close. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

05:00 IST daily. anka-pit-regime-tape.timer + .service on VPS systemd (Cohort G 2026-04-28). pipeline/scripts/capture_pit_regime_tape_forward.py — freezes today_regime.json into PIT tape forward feed. Load-bearing for NEUTRAL_OVERLAY family (H-2026-04-28-001..004). Audit: 2026-04-28-pit-regime-tape-data-source-audit.md

SECRSI 09:16 IST Mon-Fri F&O universe LTP capture. anka-secrsi-capture-opens.timer + .service on VPS systemd (Cohort G 2026-04-28). python -m pipeline.research.h_2026_04_27_secrsi.forward_shadow capture-opens. Required by basket-open. H-2026-04-27-003 holdout 2026-04-28 -> 2026-07-31.

SECRSI 11:00 IST Mon-Fri snapshot + basket open. anka-secrsi-basket-open.timer + .service on VPS systemd (Cohort G 2026-04-28). python -m pipeline.research.h_2026_04_27_secrsi.forward_shadow basket-open. Builds 8-leg market-neutral basket per spec section 3. H-2026-04-27-003.

SECRSI 14:30 IST Mon-Fri mechanical TIME_STOP close. anka-secrsi-basket-close.timer + .service on VPS systemd (Cohort G 2026-04-28). python -m pipeline.research.h_2026_04_27_secrsi.forward_shadow basket-close. Single-touch holdout 2026-04-28 -> 2026-07-31. NO PARAMETER CHANGES.

16:30 IST Mon-Fri. anka-pattern-scanner-scan.timer + .service on VPS systemd (Cohort G 2026-04-28). python -m pipeline.cli_pattern_scanner scan. Detects and ranks TA patterns across the F&O universe using pre-fitted stats. Requires pattern_stats.parquet (AnkaPatternScannerFit). Wired in T9 amended (paired-shadow deferred to T8).

Sun 02:00 IST weekly. MIGRATED TO VPS 2026-04-28 (anka-pattern-scanner-fit.timer + .service systemd unit on Contabo). python -m pipeline.cli_pattern_scanner fit. 5-year walk-forward fit of TA pattern stats across the F&O universe. ~14-min wall on VPS (vs ~71 min on laptop). Output consumed daily by AnkaPatternScannerScan. Laptop pulls back via AnkaVPSSyncWeekly 04:00 IST Sun. Wired in T9 amended.

Sun 23:00 IST weekly. anka_theme_detector.bat -- python -m pipeline.research.theme_detector.detector against themes_frozen.json. Phase 1 v1.0 wired 2026-05-01 (#76). Writes themes_<date>.json + updates state file (mtime is freshness contract). Laptop-only because Trendlyne raw_exports land manually on laptop and are gitignored (not on VPS). Shadow-mode operational; NOT yet citable as evidence per §21 of data validation policy (C2/C5 proxies + 4-week shadow window pending). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-01-theme-detector-design.md §4.

T+1 09:25 IST after pattern scan. scanner_paired_open.bat -- opens paired (futures + options) shadow rows for yesterday's Top-10 from pattern_signals_today.json. Paper engine -- exempt from 14:30 IST cutoff per Q3 of Scanner spec §4.
T+1 15:30 IST same session. scanner_paired_close.bat -- mechanical close of OPEN scanner paired rows at Kite LTP. Sidecar pattern: futures shadow runs unaffected on options-side failure.

04:30 IST daily during holdout 2026-04-29 -> 2026-05-28. anka-ta-karpathy-predict.timer + .service systemd unit on Contabo. python -m pipeline.ta_scorer.karpathy_predict -- emits per-stock p_long/p_short and signal flags from frozen Lasso models. H-2026-04-29-ta-karpathy-v1. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-29-ta-karpathy-v1-design.md.

09:15 IST daily during holdout 2026-04-29 -> 2026-05-28. anka-ta-karpathy-open.timer + .service. python -m pipeline.ta_scorer.karpathy_holdout open -- reads today_predictions.json + manifest.json, opens trades for cells passing all 5 qualifier gates. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

15:25 IST daily during holdout 2026-04-29 -> 2026-05-28. anka-ta-karpathy-close.timer + .service. python -m pipeline.ta_scorer.karpathy_holdout close -- mechanical TIME_STOP at Kite LTP per spec section 10.6. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

Every 10 min. anka-auto-push.timer -> auto_push_branches.sh. Pushes every local branch on the VPS clone to origin so RPO <= 10 min. Foundational for laptop=context / VPS=execution split (CLAUDE.md), so a laptop crash never costs more than the last push interval. Watchdog has no output file to inspect; failure-watcher service alerts on systemd failure transitions instead.

Every 15 min. anka-failure-watcher.timer -> check_systemd_failures.sh. WATCHLIST = anka-{auto-push,mirror-push,security-daily,security-weekly,terminal}.service. Flag-file pattern in /var/lib/anka/failure-flags/ ensures one Telegram alert per failure transition (idempotent). The meta-watchdog for VPS-side cron jobs.

Sun 04:00 IST. anka-faq-sync.timer -> git pull --ff-only origin feat/phase-c-v5 in ~/askanka.com. Refreshes the FAQ source corpus that feeds the Hermes system-faq skill (docs/faq/INDEX.md + every cited source file). info tier — Hermes is interactive, not blocking. Watchdog has no output file to inspect; rely on AnkaFailureWatcher for alerts on service failure transitions.

06:00 IST daily. anka-security-daily.timer -> run_daily.sh. Sequences: report_apt_status (upgradable + last unattended run), auth_triage (24h failed-ssh + suspect sudo, fail2ban summary), port_audit (diff vs baseline_listening_ports.txt), ssh_keys_audit (sha256 vs authorized_keys.sha256), resource_watch (disk/mem). Greentick to Telegram on errors=0; per-check alerts on anomalies.

Sun 04:00 IST. anka-security-weekly.timer -> weekly_audit.sh. lynis audit system --quick + rkhunter --check --report-warnings-only. Telegram one-liner with hardening index, warnings, suggestions, rkhunter warnings; full logs kept in /var/log/anka-security/.

Continuous service (anka-terminal.service, simple type, Restart=on-failure). uvicorn pipeline.terminal.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000. Reverse-proxied access TBD (not yet exposed). Foundational for unblocking pairwise audit UI (Gemma4 pilot Tasks 15-16) which will run on the same web app.

04:30 IST Mon-Fri. anka_intraday_v1_loader.bat -> runner loader-refresh. Refreshes Kite 1-min cache for V1 universe (stocks + indices) per data audit §9.1. Registered via register_intraday_v1_all.ps1 2026-04-28.
09:30 IST Mon-Fri. anka_intraday_v1_open.bat -> runner live-open. Opens V1 holdout paper trades. Writes/appends to recommendations.csv. Registered via register_intraday_v1_all.ps1 2026-04-28.
14:30 IST Mon-Fri. anka_intraday_v1_close.bat -> runner live-close. Mechanical TIME_STOP close at Kite LTP for V1 holdout trades. Registered via register_intraday_v1_all.ps1 2026-04-28.

Last Sunday of the month, 02:00 IST. anka_intraday_v1_recalibrate.bat -> runner recalibrate --pool stocks then --pool indices. host=manual â€” operator-triggered (Windows Task Scheduler lacks a clean last-Sunday-of-month trigger, and the first recalibration window is end-May 2026 since the holdout started 2026-04-29). Promote to host=laptop with a weekly Sunday 02:00 trigger + self-skip in the .bat once we're ready to automate.

04:50 IST Mon-Fri. vps_sync_daily.bat â€” pulls back AnkaDailyDump artifacts (pipeline/data/daily/*.json + pipeline/data/flows/*.json + pipeline/data/fno_historical/*.csv) from Contabo VPS via scp. Closes the laptop-side mirror so chart endpoint, FII flows and morning_scan see fresh files. outputs[] empty because the contract is that the destination directories MUST be fresh; the per-directory freshness is checked by AnkaDailyDump's outputs (data/daily/{today}.json) and by the chart-v2 audit (pipeline/data/fno_historical staleness). Registered 2026-04-28.
15:00 IST Mon-Fri. Closes the post-market visibility lag for VPS-hosted strategy ledgers (SECRSI, TA Karpathy, Gemma 4 audit). Companion to AnkaVPSSyncDaily (04:50). Registered 2026-04-30.

Sunday 04:00 IST. vps_sync_weekly.bat â€” pulls back AnkaPatternScannerFit artifact (pipeline/data/scanner/pattern_stats.parquet) from Contabo VPS via scp. outputs[] empty because the freshness contract is enforced via AnkaPatternScannerFit's host=vps inventory entry. Registered 2026-04-28.

04:30 IST daily on Contabo VPS systemd (anka-cross-asset-predict.timer). H-2026-05-04 cross-asset per-stock EN forward predict for qualifying (stock,direction) cells. Holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-04. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-04-cross-asset-perstock-lasso-v1-design.md. SINGLE-TOUCH HOLDOUT -- no parameter changes during window.

09:15 IST trading days on Contabo VPS systemd (anka-cross-asset-open.timer). H-2026-05-04 fires LONG/SHORT at Kite LTP for cells where p_long>=0.6 AND p_short<0.4 (mirror for SHORT). Per-leg ATR(14)x2 stop. Holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-04.

14:25 IST trading days on Contabo VPS systemd (anka-cross-asset-close.timer). H-2026-05-04 mechanical TIME_STOP at Kite LTP (or ATR_STOP if intraday touched). 5 min before universal 14:30 IST cutoff. Holdout 2026-05-04 -> 2026-08-04.

Last Sunday of month 02:00 IST on Contabo VPS systemd (anka-cross-asset-recalibrate.timer). H-2026-05-04 monthly refit. GATED on terminal_state.json present (post-verdict). Forbidden during active holdout window per backtesting-specs.txt section 10.4. Will skip silently if terminal_state.json missing.
